name: reado-station
description: AI 情报站运营平台 - Read All. Miss Nothing.

scripts.pipeline: npm run sync-sources && npm run collect
scripts.pipeline:cloud: npm run sync-sources && npm run collect:cloud
scripts.pipeline:auto: npm run sync-sources && npm run collect && npm run summarize
scripts.build:site: npm run build:site-data && npm run translate && npm run build:images && cd site && npx astro build
scripts.build:site-no-translate: npm run build:site-data && npm run build:images && cd site && npx astro build
